productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Navy Blue Kurta
description: Composition Navy blue and red printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton,has a 4 buttoned placket, long sleeves with embellished cuffs, smocking over shoulders, pintucks on bodice opening out below, long vents at sides Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which will keep you cool in warm weather while the bright printed flowers sing out of the dark background. Subtle details are provided by the smocking and pintucks. Wear this over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
